DeviceInfoType

public enum DeviceInfoType : Int

The device information type

Since

0.5
  • systemId

    The device information type is system ID.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case systemId = 0x2A23
  • modelNumberString

    The device information type is model number string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case modelNumberString = 0x2A24
  • serialNumberString

    The device information type is serial number string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case serialNumberString = 0x2A25
  • firmwareRevisionString

    The device information type is firmware revision string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case firmwareRevisionString = 0x2A26
  • hardwareRevisionString

    The device information type is hardware revision string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case hardwareRevisionString = 0x2A27
  • softwareRevisionString

    The device information type is software revision string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case softwareRevisionString = 0x2A28
  • manufacturerNameString

    The device information type is manufacturer name string.

    Declaration

    Swift

    case manufacturerNameString = 0x2A29
